title: A Builder's Dream
description: The Perfect Modpack for a builder or command block creator. It features almost only client side mods which makes it possible to wotk on servers too.
body:
# The Perfect Modpack For Every Builder or command block creator.

It features many performance mods and almost only client side mods which means that you can use it on any server you want.

This Modpack contains mods like:
- Axiom
- sodium + Iris
- Bridging Mod
- cook copy
- component viewer
- etc.

The modpack makes building and command block creating as easy as you've never seen before.

**So If you ever want to build something and don't want to spend ages building your Castle or Huge library, then this will be the perfect Modpack.**
